title: Queen vs Advanced Pawn
summary: The famous race — usually the queen wins

steps.title: The Zig-Zag Technique
steps.text: When a queen faces a pawn one step from promotion, the queen wins IF she can zig-zag checks to force the enemy king in front of his own pawn. Each time the king blocks, the queen gains a tempo to bring her king closer.

steps.title: The Exceptions
steps.text: The queen FAILS to win against: (a) a bishop-pawn on the 7th (stalemate tricks), (b) a rook-pawn on the 7th (same). Against knight or center pawns, the queen always wins.
